No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to health, well-being, or medical topics.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education and explicitly aims to foster international interaction, knowledge exchange, and broader perspectives, aligning with Targets 4.3 and 4.7.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course includes topics like 'History of Reform and Opening-up' and 'Shibusawa Eiichi's social contributions,' which relate to historical economic development and growth (Target 8.1).
evidence: 從渋澤栄一的社會貢獻活動能看到什麼？

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: While historical political systems are discussed, there's no direct focus on reducing inequalities in income, opportunity, or social inclusion.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to urban development or sustainable communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to sustainable consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description, objectives, or schedule relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly focuses on the historical development of political thought, democracy, and constitutional politics in Japan and China, directly supporting Target 16.6.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly aims to foster international interaction between local and international students and faculty, promoting knowledge exchange and capacity building (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
